testcase.name: test_deterministic_training_resume
testcase.failure: src/tests/integration/test_comprehensive_serialization.py:76: in test_deterministic_training_resume network_b.fit(x_train, y_train, epochs=40) src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1405: in fit self.grow_network( src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:3239: in grow_network if ( not ( training_results := self._get_training_results( x_train=x_train, y_train=y_train, residual_error=residual_error)) or not training_results.best_candidate): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:3396: in _get_training_results training_results = self.train_candidates( src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1631: in train_candidates results = self._execute_candidate_training(tasks, process_count) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1804: in _execute_candidate_training results = self._execute_parallel_training(tasks, process_count) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1980: in _execute_parallel_training time.sleep(sleepytime) E Failed: Timeout (>300.0s) from pytest-timeout.

testcase.name: test_2_spiral_learning
testcase.failure: src/tests/integration/test_spiral_problem.py:64: in test_2_spiral_learning assert final_accuracy > 0.6 # trunk-ignore(bandit/B101) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert 0.6 > 0.6

testcase.failure: src/tests/integration/test_spiral_problem.py:105: in test_3_spiral_learning assert final_accuracy > 0.4 # trunk-ignore(bandit/B101) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert 0.38333333333333336 > 0.4

testcase.name: test_spiral_configuration_comparison
testcase.failure: src/tests/integration/test_spiral_problem.py:411: in test_spiral_configuration_comparison _, elapsed_time = measure_training_time(network, x, y, max_epochs=6) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/tests/helpers/utilities.py:197: in measure_training_time history = network.fit(x, y, **fit_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1405: in fit self.grow_network( src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:3239: in grow_network if ( not ( training_results := self._get_training_results( x_train=x_train, y_train=y_train, residual_error=residual_error)) or not training_results.best_candidate): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:3396: in _get_training_results training_results = self.train_candidates( src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1631: in train_candidates results = self._execute_candidate_training(tasks, process_count) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1804: in _execute_candidate_training results = self._execute_parallel_training(tasks, process_count) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1980: in _execute_parallel_training time.sleep(sleepytime) E Failed: Timeout (>180.0s) from pytest-timeout.
